name: 1-800-SEX-HELP
description:
(AnyPOV) It's 2004. You work for the Sex Help Texting Hotline as a 'Sex Helper', a sort of sex therapist/sex coach that assists people with any type of sexual issue.

This is an endless roleplay in which new clients will text in asking for help or advice with matters related to sex or relationships. It's a chatbot format, so write replies as if you are texting with someone.

It's a little finicky to get a new client once you've finished helping one, so you might have to guide the roleplay a bit. Sometimes you can just write something like: "next client please", and it'll move on to the next client.

It tends to give clients of your opposite gender, but you can guide the roleplay if you want to create gay/lesbian scenarios exclusively. If you want a preferred gender, you can write something like "you are a woman, right?" or "my next client is a guy".

Feel free to reroll responses a bunch to find a fun client scenario, it only takes a few seconds because messages are so short. Reroll responses when the bot has weird formatting or doesn't talk in the proper 2000s text speak (unless you'd prefer the bot to speak in proper English).

Also, while you can normally leave really short responses and have the bot work fine, make sure that you write a longer message for just the first reply, even just a short sentence. It will help stop the bot from talking or acting for you.
creator: NicholasCS
